problem id: 303d2e72
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  01110111 -> 00000001
  01100010 -> 00000001
  01001010 -> 00000000
  01000111 -> 00000000
  10101010 -> 00000000
  00110111 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 00000111
  01100100 -> 00000001
  01010101 -> 00000000

query: 00111101
predicted answer: 00000000
